title: GLM 5.2 FULLY FREE & FAST CODER: This AI Coder is CRAZY & WORKS!
summary: Big Pickle is a free stealth coding model running GLM-5.2 available inside OpenCode. It offers around 200 free requests per five-hour window with reported fast token speeds and low latency, suitable for real coding tasks like repo exploration, bug fixes, refactoring, and smaller features.
writeup: The video covers Big Pickle, a free stealth model running GLM-5.2 and accessible through OpenCode, which provides roughly 200 free requests per five-hour window. It tests the model on coding tasks including repo exploration, bug fixes, and refactoring. The reported results note high token throughput and low time-to-first-token latency, positioning it as a no-cost option for everyday coding work.
